Description.PT-BR: Torne-se o maior treinador do Mundo Digital!
Description.EN-US: Become the greatest tamer of the Digital World!

Description.PT-BR: Fale com Repeating Tom na Seiryu Tower, em Seiryu City
Description.EN-US: Talk to Repeating Tom at Seiryu Tower, on Seiryu City

Description.PT-BR: Fale com o Líder Seiryu nas Protocol Ruins
Description.EN-US: Talk to Seiryu Leader on Protocol Ruins

Description.PT-BR: Desafie o Líder Seiryu em Seiryu City
Description.EN-US: Challenge the Seiryu Leader on Seiryu City

Description.PT-BR: Vá até a East Station para chegar ao próximo setor
Description.EN-US: Go to the East Station to reach the next sector

Description.PT-BR: Derrote o jogador misterioso que está te impedindo na Asuka Bridge
Description.EN-US: Defeat the Mystery Player stopping you on the Asuka Bridge

Description.PT-BR: Fale com o Guilmon na Asuka Inn 2F, em Asuka City
Description.EN-US: Talk with the Guilmon on Asuka Inn 2F, on Asuka City

Description.PT-BR: Fale com o Guilmon na Forest Inn
Description.EN-US: Talk with the Guilmon on Forest Inn

Description.PT-BR: Fale com o Guilmon na Zephyr Tower, em Seiryu City
Description.EN-US: Talk with the Guilmon on Zephyr Tower, on Seiryu City

Description.PT-BR: Retorne à East Station com o cartão
Description.EN-US: Return to the East Station with the card

Description.PT-BR: Confronte o Guilmon em Seiryu City sobre o cartão falso
Description.EN-US: Confront the Guilmon on Seiryu City about the fake card

Description.PT-BR: Fale com o Guilmon no porão da Forest Inn
Description.EN-US: Talk to the Guilmon at the Forest Inn Basements

Description.PT-BR: Retorne à East Station com o verdadeiro Blue Card
Description.EN-US: Return to the East Station with the real Blue Card
